emails.subject: Austin
emails.body: Austin <URL> I got a Bed and Breakfast for Friday Night with one King Size Bed. It will be nice and cozy for the six of us. Just kidding this is a pretty nice place we have 2 dbls and the hotel is in between the stadium and 6th street. (11th street). the rate is $145. the tickets are $30 so $54/person for everything. we will leave at 4 on Friday if that is ok with everyone.

emails.body: Austin Would you rather get two rooms at the Marriot and pay an extra $25 or just cram in the one room and pay a total of $25?
